description.en: Returns the locale of the current input method (for example, the keyboard layout locale if the composition is associated with anInput method editor).

excerpt.es: Returns the locale of the current input method (for example, the keyboard layout locale if the composition is associated with anInput method editor).
excerpt.en: Returns the locale of the current input method (for example, the keyboard layout locale if the composition is associated with anInput method editor).

description.en: Returns a number representing the location of the key on the keyboard or other input device. A list of the constants identifying the locations is shown above inKeyboard locations.

excerpt.es: Returns a number representing the location of the key on the keyboard or other input device. A list of the constants identifying the locations is shown above inKeyboard locations.
excerpt.en: Returns a number representing the location of the key on the keyboard or other input device. A list of the constants identifying the locations is shown above inKeyboard locations.
